HGSS.353.0001:
It seems that CELEBI has made you
travel through time...\r
to the past!\f
HGSS.353.0002:
[0103,0000,0000]: You told me...
you were the number one in the world!\f
Are you gonna quit?\f
What are you going to do now?\f
HGSS.353.0003:
[0103,0000,0000]: What aspect of you was
number one?\f
Gathering so many only to be defeated
by a mere child!\f
HGSS.353.0004:
[0103,0000,0000]: I don’t understand you!\f
You don’t make any sense!\f
HGSS.353.0005:
[0103,0000,0000]: I don’t want to
understand you!\f
I will never become someone like you.\f
A coward when you’re alone and
acting like a tyrant when you’re in\r
front of other cowards!\f
I will become strong!\f
I will become a stronger man all
by myself!\f
HGSS.353.0008:
..................\f
One must acknowledge one’s defeat
before he can move on...\f
I will go solo...for now...\f
So that one day I will form
a stronger organization!\f
HGSS.353.0009:
Putting together the potential of many
is how you produce a huge power...\r
That’s what an organization is...\f
That’s the strength of
an organization!\f
I failed...to make the best use of
my subordinates’ potential...!\f
But you shall witness one day
the revival of me and my [FF00,0001]Team Rocket[FF00,0000]!\f
HGSS.353.0013:
Ethan: Ilex Forest has disappeared!\f
...That’s not it.
It’s more like we have been\r
transported somewhere else...?\f
HGSS.353.0014:
Lyra: Ilex Forest has disappeared!\f
...That’s not it.
It’s more like we have been\r
transported somewhere else...?\f
HGSS.353.0015:
[0103,0000,0000], something is strange!\f
I heard the radio mentioning
the date from three years ago!\f
HGSS.353.0016:
[0103,0000,0000], something is strange!\f
I heard the radio mentioning
the date from three years ago!\f
HGSS.353.0017:
Is that...am I looking at...
CELEBI?\f
That explains it!
CELEBI must have caused all this!\f
My grandpa once told me that
CELEBI can travel through time using\r
its mystic power called [FF00,0001]Time Travel[FF00,0000]!\f
CELEBI must have taken us back in time!
Literally!\f
HGSS.353.0018:
Is that...am I looking at...
CELEBI?\f
That explains it!
CELEBI must have caused all this!\f
My grandpa once told me that
CELEBI can travel through time using\r
its mystic power called [FF00,0001]Time Travel[FF00,0000]!\f
CELEBI must have taken us back in time!
Literally!\f
HGSS.353.0019:
[0103,0000,0000], there is someone else
here besides us! Let’s go find out who!\f
HGSS.353.0020:
[0103,0000,0000], there is someone else
here besides us! Let’s go find out who!\f
HGSS.353.0021:
Ethan: Who does he think he is?
That was unnecessary!\f
But what were they talking about?
The revival of [FF00,0001]Team Rocket[FF00,0000]...?\f
They say that Team Rocket was
removed from the Kanto region\r
by a child three years ago.\f
So this really is three years ago!\f
HGSS.353.0022:
Lyra: Who does he think he is?
That was unnecessary!\f
But what were they talking about?
The revival of [FF00,0001]Team Rocket[FF00,0000]...?\f
They say that Team Rocket was
removed from the Kanto region\r
by a child three years ago.\f
So this really is three years ago!\f
HGSS.353.0023:
Oh no! It’s happening again...!\f
It’s CELEBI’s [FF00,0001]Time Travel[FF00,0000]!\f
HGSS.353.0024:
